para_trans: Forest Land- Gadchiroli
Proposal for seeking prior approval of the
Central Government under Section 2 (1) (ii) of
the Van (Sanrakshan Evam Samvardhan)
Adhiniyam, 1980 for non-forestry use of
937.077 ha _ forest land for Scientific
exploration and excavation and systematic
recovery of low grade iron ore (i.e. Hematite quartzite) from adjacent existing mines in
Village Hedri, Bande & Parsalgondi, Round-
Parsalgondi, Range-Etapalli of District
Gadchiroli in the State of Maharashtra in
favour of M/s Lloyds Metals And Energy
Limited.
Government of Maharashtra
Revenue and Forest Department
Government Order No.FLD-36A24/C.R.100/F-10
Mantralaya, Mumbai 400 032.
Reference:
1) Additional Principal Chief Conservator of Forests & Nodal Officer, letter
No.Desk-17/FCA-S 1/PID-454750/Gadchiroli/3567, Dt.28.03.2024.
2) Government of Maharashtra letter No.FLD-36A24/C.R.100/F-10, dt.11.06.2024.
3) Ministry of Environment, Forests & Climate Change, Government of India, (FC
Division), letter No. FP/MH/IND/454750/2023, dt. 12.05.2025.
4) Additional Principal Chief Conservator of Forests & Nodal Officer, Letter No.
Desk-17/FCA-S2/PID-454750/Gadchiroli/2620, Dt.05.02.2026.
5) Government of Maharashtra letter No.FLD-36A24/C.R.100/F-10, dt.16.02.2026.
6) Ministry of Environment, Forests & Climate Change, Government of India (FC
Division) letter No. FP/MH/IND/454750/2023, dt. 15.04.2026.
7) Additional Principal Chief Conservator of Forests & Nodal Officer, Letter No.
Desk-17/Nodal/Gadchiroli Circle/PID-454750/178, Dt.23.04.2026.
Order:-
Whereas, the Additional Principal Chief Conservator of Forests & Nodal
Officer, Nagpur vide letter under reference No.1 has submitted a proposal to the State
Government for diversion of 937.077 ha. forest land under Section-2 of the Van
(Sanrakshan Evam Samvardhan) Adhiniyam, 1980 for scientific exploration &
excavation and systematic recovery of low grade iron ore (1.e. Hematite quartzite) from
adjacent existing mines in Village - Hedri, Bande & Parsalgondi, Round-Parsalgondi,
Range-Etapalli of District Gadchiroli in the State of Maharashtra;
AND whereas, the State Government vide under letter reference No.2 has sent
the proposal for approval of Ministry of Environment, Forests & Climate Change,
Government of India (FC Division);
AND whereas, the Government of India after due consideration, vide letter
Under reference No.3, accorded 'In-principle' approval to divert the 937.077 ha. The Forest
Land for the above project under section 2 of Van (Sanrakshan Evam Samvardhan)
Adhiniyam, 1980. The said approval is subject to fulfillment of certain conditions by the
User Agency;
AND whereas, the Additional Principal Chief Conservator of Forests & Nodal
Officer, Maharashtra State, Nagpur vide letter under reference No.4 has submitted
compliance of those conditions to the State of Maharashtra;
AND whereas, the State Government vide letters under reference No.5 has
submitted compliance of those conditions to the Government of India;
AND whereas, the Ministry of Environment, Forests & Climate Change,
Government of India (FC Division), wide under reference no. 6 Accorded 'Final
approval 'to divert the of 937.077 ha of forest land in favour of M / s Lloyd's Metals and
Energy Limited, Gadchiroli for Scientific exploration and excavation and systematic
recovery of low grade iron ore (i.e. Hematite quartzite) from adjacent existing mines in
Village Hedri, Bande & Parsalgondi, Round-Parsalgondi, Range-Etapalli of District
Gadchiroli in the State of Maharashtra under section 2 of Van (Sanrakshan Evam
Samvardhan) Adhiniyam, 1980;
AND whereas, the Additional Principal Chief Conservator of Forests & Nodal
Officer, Maharashtra State, Nagpur vide letter under reference No.7 has requested State
Government to issue diversion order in the matter;
NOW, therefore, Government of Maharashtra hereby directs that the area of
937.077 ha consisting of Reserved Forest and Protected Forest, Land more specifically
described in the proposal submitted vide letter under   reference No. | and as per details
given in the Schedule given below, be diverted to the User Agency, 1.e. M/s Lloyds
Metals And Energy Limited, Gadchiroli for Scientific exploration and excavation and
systematic recovery of low grade iron ore (i.e. Hematite quartzite) from adjacent
existing mines in Village Hedri, Bande & Parsalgondi, Round-Parsalgondi, Range-
Etapalli of District Gadchiroli in the State of Maharashtra.
The diversion shall be effected subject to the terms and conditions mentioned in
the letters dated 12.05.2025 and dated 15.04.2026 of MoEF&CC, Government of India
(FC Division). This approval for diversion of forest land is also subject to compliance of
following conditions by the User Agency-
1. The Chief Conservator of Forests (1), Gadchiroli, in consultation with PCCF
(Wildlife), will ensure that wildlife clearance is not required for the project,
before actual handing over of forest land to the User Agency.
The User Agency shall comply with all the conditions stipulated in the 4'in-
Principle 'and' final approval 'letters of MOEF & CC, Government of India (FC)
Division), referred above. The Chief Conservator of Forests (T), Gadchiroli shall
ensure the strict compliance of the conditions by the User Agency and shall
furnish the report in this regard to Additional Principal Chief Conservator of
Forests and Nodal Officer, Maharashtra State, Nagpur from time to time.
3. For ensuring the compliances and for monitoring the duly prescribed activities
and also to carry out other statuary duties, user agency shall facilitate unhindered
access/entry in the area to the local forest Officer. In case the user agency
prohibits the free access or create hindrances, the permission given under this
Order for the diversion of forest area for the non-forest use shall be withdrawn.
4. Non-compliance of any of the conditions mentioned in MoOEF&CC, Government
of India (FC Division) letters dated 12.05.2025 and dated 15.04.2026, in this
order and Rules & Guidelines made / issued under Van (Sanrakshan Evam
Samvardhan) Adhiniyam, 1980, shall amount to violation of Van (Sanrakshan
Evam Samvardhan) Adhiniyam, 1980 and action would be taken accordingly.
5. In case of non-compliance of any of the above conditions, the Chief Conservator
of Forests (T), Gadchiroli shall report through the State Government to Ministry
of Environment, Forests & Climate Change, Government of India (FC Division)
as per procedure laid down in guidelines under the Van (Sanrakshan Evam
Samvardhan) Adhiniyam, 1980.
SCHEDULE
